nodes.name: architecture-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Template for producing a comprehensive architecture document covering system overview, tech stack decisions, data models, API design, and deployment strategy for a new project.

nodes.name: brainstorming-output-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Template for capturing and organizing the output of a brainstorming session into categorized ideas, themes, and prioritized next steps.

nodes.name: brownfield-architecture-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Template for documenting the architecture of an enhancement to an existing system, emphasizing current-state analysis, integration points, and risk mitigation for brownfield projects.

nodes.name: brownfield-prd-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Template for a Product Requirements Document scoped to brownfield enhancements, capturing enhancement goals, current system constraints, out-of-scope items, and compatibility requirements.

nodes.name: competitor-analysis-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Template for structured competitor analysis covering feature comparison, market positioning, strengths/weaknesses, and strategic differentiation opportunities.

nodes.name: front-end-architecture-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Template for documenting front-end architecture decisions including component structure, state management, routing, styling approach, and build pipeline configuration.

nodes.name: front-end-spec-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Template for capturing UI/UX specifications including user flows, component designs, interaction patterns, and accessibility requirements to guide front-end implementation.

nodes.name: fullstack-architecture-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Template for full-stack application architecture documentation, covering both client and server layers, data flow, API contracts, authentication, and infrastructure design.

nodes.name: market-research-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Template for market research documents covering target audience analysis, market size, user pain points, and opportunity validation to inform product strategy.

nodes.name: prd-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Core PRD template driving interactive creation of a Product Requirements Document with goals, user stories, epics, technical requirements, and success metrics.

nodes.name: project-brief-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Template for the foundational project brief capturing problem statement, target users, success metrics, MVP scope, and key constraints to anchor all downstream planning.

nodes.name: qa-gate-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Template for the QA gate report produced after story implementation review, documenting pass/fail status per acceptance criterion and listing any required fixes.

nodes.name: story-tmpl.yaml
nodes.summary: Core story document template defining the standard sections (status, story, acceptance criteria, tasks, dev notes, testing, change log) used for every implementation story in BMad.

edges.label: story template feeds QA gate review
